proposals.spec_text: Given the shared Prelude.fsx preamble has been updated, When any script that loads it runs, Then all scripting library modules are available
proposals.actual: Prelude.fsx deleted. Scripts inline #r nuget: PhysicsSandbox.Scripting directly.
proposals.proposed_text: Given a script includes #r "nuget: PhysicsSandbox.Scripting", When the script is executed, Then all scripting library modules and transitive dependencies are available without additional references.
proposals.rationale: NuGet packaging makes shared preamble unnecessary. Single #r line is simpler.

proposals.spec_text: The pack-and-publish workflow completes in a single command sequence, following the established local NuGet pattern.
proposals.actual: Commands run manually in dependency order. No automation script.
proposals.proposed_text: The pack-and-publish workflow follows the established local NuGet pattern (dependency-ordered dotnet pack with -p:NoWarn=NU5104 -o ~/.local/share/nuget-local/).
proposals.rationale: BepuFSharp pattern uses manual commands. Single command sequence was aspirational, not required.

proposals.spec_text: All server port references across scripts and documentation MUST use the canonical ports
proposals.actual: reports/mcpReport.md also fixed. Already covered by FR-008 wording.
proposals.rationale: FR-008 says 'documentation' which includes reports/. No spec update needed.
